params.name: Fungus XL
params.description: The fungi from the Fungus Farm didn't want to be gathered. Their resentment took a human form and became a Hitman working for Demon Gods! After its defeat, its essence coalesced into this Relic. It is an upsetting fact that you took full advantage of this poor little thing.
params.ss1:
Per 10 DEF-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +1
DEF-Fungi Eaten: 500/500

DEF-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
